inputs.label: Max Input Value
inputs.businessContext: Maximum value of color components (typically 255 for 8-bit)

formulas.cyan: (Math.max(red/maxValue, green/maxValue, blue/maxValue) === 0) ? 0 : ((Math.max(red/maxValue, green/maxValue, blue/maxValue) - (red/maxValue)) / Math.max(red/maxValue, green/maxValue, blue/maxValue)) * scale
formulas.magenta: (Math.max(red/maxValue, green/maxValue, blue/maxValue) === 0) ? 0 : ((Math.max(red/maxValue, green/maxValue, blue/maxValue) - (green/maxValue)) / Math.max(red/maxValue, green/maxValue, blue/maxValue)) * scale
formulas.yellow: (Math.max(red/maxValue, green/maxValue, blue/maxValue) === 0) ? 0 : ((Math.max(red/maxValue, green/maxValue, blue/maxValue) - (blue/maxValue)) / Math.max(red/maxValue, green/maxValue, blue/maxValue)) * scale
